scripts.build:frontend: npm run build --workspace @ai-review/shared && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ai-review/shared && npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace backend && npm run lint --workspace frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @ai-review/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace backend && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @ai-review/shared && npm run test --workspace backend && npm run test --workspace frontend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace @ai-review/shared && npm run test:coverage --workspace backend && npm run test:coverage --workspace frontend
